---
title: "day6draft"
output: html_document
---

## Distribution of the Mean     
```{r}
getmean=function(N, mean, sd){
  opinion=rnorm(n = N, mean=mean,sd=sd)
  meanopinion=mean(opinion)
  return(meanopinion)} 
#Building a function in R. This is beyond the scope of the class

manymeansa=replicate(n = 10, getmean(20, mean=65, sd=6))
hist(manymeansa, main="Many Means 10 Draws", sub=mean(manymeansa))
mean(manymeansa)
abline(v=mean(manymeansa), col="orange")

#look with different n
manymeansb=replicate(n = 20, getmean(20, mean=65, sd=6))
hist(manymeansb, main="Many Means 20 Draws", sub=mean(manymeansb))
mean(manymeansb)
abline(v=mean(manymeansb), col="orange")


manymeansc=replicate(n = 100, getmean(20, mean=65, sd=6))
hist(manymeansc, main="Many Means 100 Draws", sub=mean(manymeansc))
mean(manymeansc)
abline(v=mean(manymeansc), col="orange")


manymeansd=replicate(n = 1000, getmean(20, mean=65, sd=6))
hist(manymeansd, main="Many Means 1k Draws", sub=mean(manymeansd))
mean(manymeansd)
abline(v=mean(manymeansd), col="orange")

manymeanse=replicate(n = 1000, getmean(20, mean=65, sd=6))
hist(manymeanse, main="Many Means 1000 Draws", sub=mean(manymeanse))
mean(manymeanse)
abline(v=mean(manymeanse), col="orange")

manymeansf=replicate(n = 10000, getmean(20, mean=65, sd=6))
hist(manymeansf, main="Many Means 10k Draws", sub=mean(manymeansf))
mean(manymeansf)
abline(v=mean(manymeansf), col="orange")

#Larger sample sizes should be closer to "true mean" but still variation
abline(v=65, col="blue")
abline(v=mean(manymeansa), col="darkorange4")
abline(v=mean(manymeansb), col="darkorange3")
abline(v=mean(manymeansc), col="darkorange2")
abline(v=mean(manymeansd), col="darkorange1")
abline(v=mean(manymeanse), col="darkorange")
abline(v=65, col="blue")



mean(manymeansa)
mean(manymeansb)
mean(manymeansc)
mean(manymeansd)
mean(manymeanse)
mean(manymeansf) #as n increases will get closer to true mean

sd(manymeansa) # . . . and sd
sd(manymeansb)
sd(manymeansc)
sd(manymeansd)
sd(manymeanse)
sd(manymeansf)
```
